---
title: "Home"
---

# Henry Yin

**Statistics and Data Science Student – UCLA**

Welcome to my personal website. I am a Statistics and Data Science student at the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA) with a strong interest in data analysis, machine learning, and statistical modeling.

My academic work focuses on understanding data through statistical methods and turning complex datasets into meaningful insights.

## Interests

- Data Analysis
- Statistical Modeling
- Machine Learning
- Data Visualization
- Business Analytics

## Quick Background

- 🎓 UCLA — B.S. Statistics and Data Science (Expected 2026)
- 💻 Programming: Python, R, SQL, C++
- 📊 Tools: Power BI, Excel, RStudio
- 📈 Experience with regression analysis, statistical inference, and data visualization

## What I Do

I enjoy working with real-world datasets to uncover patterns and insights. My work often involves:

- cleaning and analyzing datasets
- building statistical models
- visualizing trends and relationships
- communicating results clearly

You can explore my work in the **Projects** section.
